subject: [SDC] Update sdc images for Frankfurt
commit_message:
[SDC] Update sdc images for Frankfurt

Update the sdc images for frankfurt maintenance release, moving to 1.6.

Issue-ID: SDC-3189
Signed-off-by: sebdet <sebastien.determe@intl.att.com>
Change-Id: I1f7ea5f6aee0def6d9711e9c93496e00024f7e26
(cherry picked from commit e1a57e0c3bfcb2b1441e6d30c2d1916961dc670b)

Patch Set 1:

hmmm, I think we still see the 'old' results, when you look at the test timestamps, I see 'morning' timestamps whereas this was triggered with your comment in the evening : 10:XX or if you look the 5gbulkPM report it show on top right of the screen : "Generated 20200713 12:12:39 UTC+02:00 20 hours 2 minutes ago" which is not consistent with the time you launched the gate.

> 
> not as good as usual, but SDC wise, it seems ok (HC ok, Healthdist ok, sdc deploys ok, and E2E we have 2 out of 3). What do you think ?

I think it'll be hard to have better result as long as SDC AND SO are unhealthy
as e2e tests are "master" and not "elalto", we also cannot rely on them...

So I would give a try on this one!

I'm waiting for @Krzysztof review
